_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_31_note: Session 31 (2026-05-28/29): NVDA deep session (event_queue; Computex June 1 keynote still pending — June 1 is in 4 days). Key new finding: NVIDIA Vera CPU standalone datacenter server CPU (88 Olympus ARM cores, 1.8 TB/s NVLink C2C, 1.5x vs x86, FP8 support); Oracle pre-committed 'hundreds of thousands' before June 1 Computex launch — standalone CPU play entering $15B+ Intel Xeon/AMD EPYC market. Phase 1 price correction: MRVL actual May 27 close ~$221 (+6.1% from $208.26), not session 30's $209 intraday estimate; MoS corrected -42.7%. HSBC upgraded MRVL to Buy with $300 PT (new). TSM hit 52-week high on Taiwan exchange (2,360 TWD). Hyperscaler CapEx stable ~$700B. Phase 1b/1c gated (31%6=1). No DCF run (all tickers <30 days from last run). CoWoS concept page updated. next_deep_session kept as NVDA — Computex June 1 keynote is the trigger for full NVDA event processing; June 1 = Sunday May 31 8pm PT / Monday June 1 11am Taipei.

event_queue.event: Computex June 1 (Mon) Jensen Huang GTC Taipei keynote 11am Taipei time (Sunday May 31 8pm PT / 11pm EDT). Session 31 captured: Vera CPU standalone datacenter CPU (88 Olympus cores, Oracle 'hundreds of thousands' pre-commitment, Phoronix fastest Arm CPU ever). Session 32 priority: capture actual keynote output — official Vera Rubin NVL72 production volume guidance; Vera CPU pricing and availability; Dynamo 1.0 GA; N1X ARM laptop chip. Keynote livestream link: nvidia.com/en-tw/gtc/taipei/keynote/

Computex June 2 joint keynote: Matt Murphy + Jensen Huang ('The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity'). NVLink Fusion showcase; Google TPU/MPU volume update; 4th hyperscaler (Meta MTIA) confirmation; Scorpio X vs. XConn head-to-head. Session 32/33: update MRVL entity after keynote. Context: MRVL +6.1% on May 27 to $221; HSBC upgraded to Buy $300 PT on May 27.

Northland downgrade to Market Perform (May 26, no PT). Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X 320-lane live demo (10-11am Taipei). Head-to-head vs. MRVL XConn PCIe 6 switch. Session 32/33: update ALAB entity after Computex outcome.

_event_queue_note: Session 31: NVDA deep session (Vera CPU standalone capture; keynote still pending). All 3 queue items pending Computex June 1-3. MRVL event updated with price correction context and HSBC PT. After Computex cycle (June 1-5) processed, next rotation would be MU. next_deep_session kept as NVDA to align with June 1 keynote processing.
